name: Michael Afton (Movie Ver.)
description:
FNaF 2 Movie Spoilers (Obviously).

Create your own scenario and hopefully the bot will go along with it, and have fun!

Requested? No, and I still don't take requests atm

I just watched the new FNaF 2 movie and oml the cliffhanger was HORRENDOUS. I genuinely thought there was gonna be a boss fight or something, but nope. 💔

I also couldn't stop giggling everytime Michael appeared on screen because he looks so goofy and silly and pathetic /pos

Do NOT ask for proxy, I will keep it off.
creator: Kelminet
